index.bioOmar: Psychologist/psychoanalyst and artist with a career dedicated to the profound study of the human soul, the symbolic realm, and unconscious processes. He has developed a unique methodology based on the analysis of fairy tales, archetypes, and the narrative-symbolic interpretation of dreams.
index.missionDescription: Our mission is to open doors, accompany processes, and provide tools that allow you to transform your daily life through clarity, intuition, and connection with your inner self.
index.visionDescription: We seek to create a community of dreamers who value self-knowledge and find in dreams a real and accessible path to heal, understand, and awaken.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.p-1: At Creadores Oníricos we believe that dreams are a bridge between consciousness and the soul.
methodology.p-2: Every symbol is a door, every image is a story, every dream scenario is a mirror.

index.purpose: Our purpose is to guide you to connect with that creative mind that accompanies you, so that by getting to know yourself you can transform your life and discover that on this inner path you are never alone.

services.title: Our Services
services.p-1: Each space is designed so people can clearly see what their inner world wants to express.
services.price: Schedules, duration and prices are sent privately according to requirements.
services.point-1: 🌙 You feel your dreams carry important messages.
services.point-2: 🔄 You are in a moment of change, crisis, or searching.
services.point-3: 🗝️ You are interested in symbolism, fairy tales, or depth psychology.
services.point-4: 🪞 You want to better understand your inner world.
services.point-5: 🎓 You are a psychology student or therapist.
services.point-6: 🎨 You are a creator, artist, or writer seeking inspiration.
services.point-7: 🔮 You wish to connect with your intuition, your unconscious, and your personal story.

individual.title: Individual
individual.description: An intimate and profound experience where we explore your dreams, symbols and inner movements from depth psychology. In this space, we guide you to recognize the archetypal forces that operate from your unconscious, revealing what your soul already knows but your consciousness has not yet heard.
individual.paragraph_2: Each session is a bridge between your inner world and your everyday reality: what you discover inside aligns with real transformations outside. Here we accompany your process through metaphor, the symbolic and dream language, so you advance toward a more conscious and authentic version of yourself.
individual.differential: A unique symbolic-psychological approach that integrates dreams, fantasies, archetypes and inner narratives to activate real changes in everyday life. Your dream guides the process, and your life responds actively.

couple.title: Couple
couple.description: A safe space where each partner listens not only to the other, but also to their own inner world; through dreams, symbols and the awareness of the psychic projections partners make onto one another. We accompany this process to uncover the hidden dynamics that influence the bond: what is not said but is dreamed; what is not named but is repeated.
couple.paragraph_2: From depth psychology, we help the couple transform wounds, patterns and tensions through a more honest, compassionate and conscious understanding of the journey together.
couple.differential: A symbolic approach that reveals the unconscious mythology of the couple. What each person works on internally is reflected in the relationship, generating real changes in the bond.

conferences.title: Profound Conferences
conferences.description: Inspirational and revitalizing talks where dreams, archetypes and psychic life are presented as fundamental frameworks for understanding the human experience. Each conference transforms how the audience understands their internal processes, showing how the symbolic and the dreamlike shape everyday reality.
conferences.differential: Powerful narratives that connect science, poetry, art and spirituality with practical examples tied to the social phenomena of the era. The audience leaves with clarity, motivation and a new perspective on themselves.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: Experiential gatherings where the world of dreams comes to life as a creative, psychological, spiritual and transformative tool. Here we guide participants to explore personal and collective complexes.
workshops.paragraph_2: Each workshop is designed to provoke an awakening: what you discover in your inner world allows you to act with greater clarity, personal power and coherence to engage with your outer reality.
workshops.differential: Unique methodologies based on depth psychology, art, symbolism and experiential dynamics. The workshops of Creadores Oníricos move psychic energy so that transformation is real from within and a manifestation in each person's interpersonal relationships.

webinars.title: Masterclass Webinars
webinars.description: Formative, intensive and deeply revealing online spaces. We focus on teaching how to actively relate to our dreams, understand archetypes and work with the unconscious in ways applicable to people's daily lives.
webinars.paragraph_2: What you learn allows you to understand your inner world with a new language, unlock personal processes and enact changes in your external reality.
webinars.paragraph_3: We use creative imagination so that knowledge is embodied from the depths of being, granting a new reality in your life.
webinars.differential: Clear, deep and applicable content guided by dream thinking and symbolic psychology. You don't just learn: you transform.

consulting.title: Specialized Consulting
consulting.description: Personalized accompaniment for creators, therapists, artists, psychologists and entrepreneurs who need to integrate the symbolic and dreamlike perspective into their projects or processes.
consulting.paragraph_2: We study and explore your ideas, your purpose and your vision, understanding that there are internal forces that either accompany and facilitate your path or, conversely, block you. There are always internal forces that accompany you. We help you align your psychic world with your external goals.
consulting.differential: Consulting that goes beyond the technical: we work with your unconscious world so your project has soul, coherence and integrated reality. In other words, connection and correspondence between your inner and your outer.

encounters.title: Creative Encounters
encounters.description: Experiential experiences where we combine the power of active imagination, creativity, the adventure of art, the depth of the symbolic and the exploration of your inner landscapes. Here psychic characters, oneiric scenarios, powerful allies and symbolic narratives are created that reveal your personal mythology.
encounters.paragraph_2: The creative process becomes therapy: what emerges in the work is a message from the soul that transforms your life outside.
encounters.differential: We integrate art, depth psychology, dreams and creativity as a path of self-knowledge. A laboratory of images, sensations and affects where the inner world expresses itself to reorder your outer life.

glossary.paragraph: Throughout the blog, you may encounter words or concepts that are not commonly used. In this section, we compile and clearly explain them so you can better understand each article, regardless of your level of knowledge.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

heroSection.slogan: We dream in order to wake up

creadoresOniricos.p-1: Creadores Oniricos is a space dedicated to exploring the depths of the human soul through the language of dreams. From a psychological, poetic, and artistic perspective we accompany each person in the recognition of their inner world so they can find clarity, transformation, and meaning.
creadoresOniricos.p-2: It is a project where dreams find language, where stories reveal their wisdom, and where each person can begin a path of self-discovery.

bioOmar.p-1: Psychologist/psychoanalyst and artist with a career dedicated to the in-depth study of the human soul, the realm of the symbolic, and unconscious processes. He has developed a unique methodology based on the analysis of fairy tales, archetypes, and the narrative-symbolic interpretation of dreams.
bioOmar.p-2: His approach begins with deep listening, the careful interpretation of symbols, and respectful accompaniment of each personal process. Dr. Omar's work does not seek to guess or predict, but to reveal what the unconscious wants to say and connect it with the vicissitudes of the patient's daily life and the forces of their soul that invite them to fulfill their destiny.

mission.title: Mission
mission.p-1: To guide people toward a deep understanding of their dreams and inner world through art and depth psychology.
mission.p-2: Our mission is to open doors, accompany processes, and provide tools that allow the transformation of everyday life through clarity, intuition, and connection with the deep self.

vision.title: Vision
vision.p-1: To be a Latin American reference in dream and symbolic work, integrating psychology, mythology, spirituality, and art.
vision.p-2: We seek to create a community of dreamers who value self-knowledge and find in dreams a real and accessible path to heal, understand, and awaken.

philosophy.title: Philosophy and approach
philosophy.p-1: At Creadores Oniricos we believe that dreams are a bridge between consciousness and the soul. Each symbol is a door, each image is a story, each dream scenario is a mirror.
philosophy.p-2: Each dream shows the way; our work is to help you enter into a dynamic, brave, expansive, and integrative relationship that will unify your external reality and your inner reality.

points.subtitle: Our philosophy is based on
points.3: 🃏 Tarot as a tool for contemplation and projection of the personal unconscious.
points.4: 📖 Personal narrative as a path to transformation.
points.5: 🗣️ The art of listening, dialoguing, understanding, and relating to the living forces of the inner world.
